report:
Caustic Creations' drum spinner - 14-6 recorded record, #4 in our current Elo book.
The strongest recent-form claim in the sources: "Copperhead eliminated both Endgame and Riptide, the scariest vertical spinners in the game" (FaceOffs, per r/battlebots).
Fans on the episode-2 thread treat Copperhead as the Group C favorite if that form holds.
Official promo leads with the Copperhead vs JackPot fight as the episode-2 Group C marquee.
Team Copperhead was among teams confirming their Pro League slot on social media in mid-June.
Group C rivals: JackPot (this week), Cobalt, and The Twins - fans call it three-way competitive.
Our buzz tracker shows a blind spot: 4th-best bot in the league, one single fan-comment mention through episode 1.
This week's JackPot fight is Copperhead's Pro League debut - no group results for it yet.
Merch line and social cadence indicate a fully active campaign.
No damage or rebuild reports found in the scraped sources.
note: cached demo report - written by Claude from the MCP-scraped sources listed (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY enables live generation)
